title: 10 Natural Herbal Teas for White Patches That Arise in the Month's Progress
description: Echinacea purpurea tea is a popular remedy for white patches on the mouth, known as oral thrush. This condition is caused by a fungus called Candida, which can grow out of control when the body's natural balance is disrupted. Echinacea purpurea tea has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help to combat this fungus. The tea contains compounds like alkylamides and caffeic acid, which have been shown to inhibit the growth of Candida. Drinking Echinacea purpurea tea may hel...
